daily_indaba.tests package

Submodules

daily_indaba.tests.base module

Shared fixtures for the retained Daily Indaba tests.

class daily_indaba.tests.base.CoreNewsApiTestCase(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: APITestCase

Shared API fixtures for retained article and newsletter tests.

authenticate(token)[source]

Attach a DRF token to the API client.

setUp()[source]

Hook method for setting up the test fixture before exercising it.

class daily_indaba.tests.base.CoreNewsWebTestCase(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: TestCase

Shared fixtures for retained web workflow tests.

setUp()[source]

Hook method for setting up the test fixture before exercising it.

class daily_indaba.tests.base.CoreNewsletterSerializerTestCase(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: TestCase

Shared fixtures for retained newsletter-serializer tests.

setUp()[source]

Hook method for setting up the test fixture before exercising it.

daily_indaba.tests.test_api_articles module

Core article API tests for The Daily Indaba.

class daily_indaba.tests.test_api_articles.ArticleApiTests(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: CoreNewsApiTestCase

Retained core article API and approval tests.

test_editor_can_approve_article_and_trigger_signal_notifications_once()[source]

Verify approval triggers email and mock POST side effects exactly once.

test_editor_can_delete_article_via_api()[source]

Verify an editor can delete an article within their assigned publisher scope.

test_editor_can_patch_article_within_scope()[source]

Verify an editor can partially update an article they curate.

test_editor_cannot_approve_article_outside_assigned_publishers()[source]

Verify an editor cannot approve an article that falls outside their publisher scope.

test_journalist_can_create_article_but_reader_cannot()[source]

Verify article creation is journalist-only at the API layer.

test_journalist_can_update_own_unapproved_article_via_put()[source]

Verify a journalist can replace their own unapproved article.

test_journalist_cannot_update_another_journalists_article_via_put()[source]

Verify a journalist cannot update another author’s article.

test_reader_cannot_delete_article_via_api()[source]

Verify readers are blocked from deleting articles via the API.

test_reader_cannot_update_article_via_put()[source]

Verify readers are blocked from article updates.

test_subscribed_feed_only_returns_followed_approved_articles()[source]

Verify the subscribed feed excludes approved articles from unfollowed sources.

test_token_endpoint_returns_token_for_valid_credentials()[source]

Verify the API token login endpoint returns a token for valid credentials.

test_unauthenticated_article_list_requires_token()[source]

Verify protected article endpoints reject requests without a token.

daily_indaba.tests.test_api_newsletters module

Core newsletter API tests for The Daily Indaba.

class daily_indaba.tests.test_api_newsletters.NewsletterApiTests(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: CoreNewsApiTestCase

Retained core newsletter API permission and CRUD tests.

test_editor_can_create_newsletter_via_api()[source]

Verify an editor can create a newsletter through the API.

test_editor_can_delete_newsletter_via_api()[source]

Verify an editor can delete a newsletter through the API.

test_journalist_can_update_own_newsletter_via_patch()[source]

Verify a journalist can update their own newsletter through the API.

test_reader_can_list_newsletters_via_api()[source]

Verify authenticated readers can list newsletters through the API.

test_reader_cannot_create_newsletter_via_api()[source]

Verify readers cannot create newsletters through the API.

Module contents

Daily Indaba test package.
